title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
abstract: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Interagency Notice of Change in Control, Interagency Notice of Change in Director or Senior Executive Officer, and Interagency Biographical and Financial Report (FR 2081a, b, and c; OMB No. 7100-0134).
action: On January 29, 2024, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (89 FR 5540) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 2081a, b, and c. The comment period for this notice expired on March 29, 2024. The Board did not receive any comments.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Federal Register > Notice > 2024-12557

The comment period for this notice expired on March 29, 2024. The Board did not receive any comments.
